Integrate outputs into executive risk reporting to maintain continuous assurance aligned with NIST CSF 2.0 risk lifecycle governance, protection, detection, response, and recovery.
evidence_required: Approved review calendar and terms of reference for Recover oversight activities.
Completed review packs showing KPI/KRI outcomes, exceptions, and root-cause analysis for recover-q5.
Risk committee or management minutes confirming escalation decisions and closure owners for Recover findings.
Follow-up validation records proving corrective actions were implemented and re-tested within agreed timelines.
questions.compliance_relevance: Demonstrates sustained governance and audit-ready oversight for Recover by evidencing periodic control evaluation, timely escalation, and accountable remediation under NIST CSF 2.0 risk lifecycle governance, protection, detection, response, and recovery.

guidance.title: Is there a formally approved control effectiveness review cadence for Recover, including escalation thresholds and accountable owners?
guidance.risk: Demonstrates sustained governance and audit-ready oversight for Recover by evidencing periodic control evaluation, timely escalation, and accountable remediation under NIST CSF 2.0 risk lifecycle governance, protection, detection, response, and recovery.
actions: Approve and publish a control review cadence and RACI model for Recover.
Run periodic effectiveness reviews, capture findings, and assign remediation owners for recover-q5.
Report open exceptions to governance forums and verify closure through independent retesting.
evidence: Approved review calendar and terms of reference for Recover oversight activities.
Completed review packs showing KPI/KRI outcomes, exceptions, and root-cause analysis for recover-q5.
Risk committee or management minutes confirming escalation decisions and closure owners for Recover findings.
Follow-up validation records proving corrective actions were implemented and re-tested within agreed timelines.
